name: Gmail & Calendar (gog)
oneLiner: Full Google Workspace CLI — Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Contacts, Sheets, and Docs.
description: Full Google Workspace CLI integration — Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Contacts, Sheets, and Docs. Read emails, create events, search files, and manage your entire Google Workspace from your AI agent.
useCases: Draft and send emails on your behalf
installSteps:
Install the gog CLI:
```bash
npm install -g @anthropic/gog
```

Configure Google OAuth credentials:
```bash
gog auth login
```

envVars.name: GOG_CREDENTIALS_PATH
envVars.description: Path to your Google OAuth credentials JSON file

name: Apple Reminders
oneLiner: Manage Apple Reminders via remindctl — add, complete, list, and organize tasks.
description: Manage Apple Reminders via the remindctl CLI. List, add, edit, complete, and delete reminders. Supports lists, date filters, and JSON output.
installSteps:
Install remindctl (macOS only):
```bash
brew install remindctl
```

name: Apple Notes
oneLiner: Create, search, edit, and organize Apple Notes from your agent.
description: Manage Apple Notes via the memo CLI on macOS — create, view, edit, delete, search, move, and export notes. Full integration with your Notes.app folders and content.
useCases: Create and organize notes from conversations
Export notes for backup or sharing
installSteps:
Install the memo CLI (macOS only):
```bash
brew install memo
```

name: Weather
oneLiner: Current weather and forecasts for any location — no API key needed.
description: Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. No API key needed. Quick weather checks for any location worldwide.
useCases: Check current weather before heading out

name: Obsidian Vault
oneLiner: Read, write, search, and organize your Obsidian knowledge base.
description: Work with Obsidian vaults (plain Markdown notes) and automate via obsidian-cli. Read, write, search, and organize your knowledge base.
useCases: Search and retrieve notes from your vault
Create new notes with proper linking
installSteps:
Ensure your Obsidian vault is accessible:
```bash
ls ~/Documents/ObsidianVault
```

envVars.name: OBSIDIAN_VAULT_PATH
envVars.description: Path to your Obsidian vault directory

name: Humanizer
oneLiner: Remove signs of AI-generated writing and make text sound natural.
description: Remove signs of AI-generated writing from text. Detects and fixes patterns including inflated symbolism, promotional language, AI vocabulary words, em dash overuse, rule of three, and more. Based on Wikipedia's comprehensive guide.
useCases: Review and polish social media posts

name: X Post Drafter
oneLiner: Draft engaging X (Twitter) posts and save to your Obsidian vault.
description: Draft X (Twitter) posts for your audience. Creates accessible, engaging content and saves drafts to your Obsidian vault for review before publishing.
useCases: Draft tweet threads from research notes
Repurpose blog content into social posts
Get feedback on draft posts before publishing

name: Video Transcript Downloader
oneLiner: Download videos, audio, subtitles, and clean transcripts from YouTube and more.
description: Download videos, audio, subtitles, and clean paragraph-style transcripts from YouTube and any yt-dlp supported site. Supports multiple formats and languages.
useCases: Convert video content to text for analysis
installSteps:
Install yt-dlp and ffmpeg:
```bash
brew install yt-dlp ffmpeg
```

name: Last X Days
oneLiner: Research and summarize what happened in a topic over the last N days.
description: Research and summarize what happened in the last N days (or a date range) about any topic. Optionally uses Reddit API and X ingestion with graceful fallback to web search.
useCases: Catch up on a topic you missed for a week
Summarize recent developments in a project
Track competitor or industry news over time
installSteps:
Optionally configure API keys for richer data sources:
```bash
export REDDIT_CLIENT_ID=your_id
export REDDIT_CLIENT_SECRET=your_secret
```

envVars.name: REDDIT_CLIENT_ID
envVars.description: Reddit API client ID (optional, for Reddit search)

name: QMD Note Search
oneLiner: Local hybrid search for markdown notes and docs across indexed collections.
description: Local hybrid search for markdown notes and docs. Search across indexed collections using semantic and keyword matching to find related content quickly.
useCases: Find related notes across large vaults
Search documentation by meaning, not just keywords
installSteps:
Install qmd:
```bash
npm install -g qmd
```

Index your markdown collections:
```bash
qmd index ~/Documents/notes
```

name: GitHub
oneLiner: Issues, PRs, CI runs, code review, and API queries via the gh CLI.
description: GitHub operations via gh CLI — issues, PRs, CI runs, code review, API queries. Full integration with your GitHub workflow for repository management.
useCases: Check PR status and CI results
installSteps:
Install the GitHub CLI:
```bash
brew install gh
```

Authenticate with your account:
```bash
gh auth login
```

envVars.name: GITHUB_TOKEN
envVars.description: GitHub personal access token (or use gh auth login)

name: GitHub Issues Automation
oneLiner: Fetch issues, spawn agents to implement fixes, open PRs, and monitor reviews.
description: Fetch GitHub issues, spawn sub-agents to implement fixes and open PRs, then monitor and address PR review comments. Supports labels, milestones, assignees, forks, and cron scheduling.
useCases: Auto-fix labeled issues and open PRs
Monitor and respond to PR review comments
installSteps:
Ensure gh CLI is installed and authenticated:
```bash
brew install gh && gh auth login
```

Run with options:
```bash
/gh-issues owner/repo --label bug --limit 5
```

name: Workflow Execution
oneLiner: Plan-first workflow with subagent routing, verification, and lessons loop.
description: Execute non-trivial work with a plan-first workflow, default subagent routing, required verification evidence, and a lessons loop. Use for multi-step tasks, architecture decisions, risky edits, or iterative bug-fixing.

name: OpenAI Whisper Transcription
oneLiner: Transcribe audio files via the OpenAI Whisper API.
description: Transcribe audio via OpenAI Audio Transcriptions API (Whisper). Supports various audio formats and produces accurate text transcriptions.
useCases: Process podcast episodes into searchable text
installSteps:
Set your OpenAI API key:
```bash
export OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-your-key-here
```

envVars.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
envVars.description: OpenAI API key for Whisper transcription access

name: Context Engineering
oneLiner: Optimize context windows, multi-agent patterns, memory, and evaluation frameworks.
description: Comprehensive context engineering guidance for AI agent systems. Routes to specialized sub-skills for production agent work including context optimization, multi-agent patterns, memory systems, and evaluation frameworks.
useCases: Optimize token costs and context windows
Debug agent failures and context degradation

name: iMessage
oneLiner: Read, search, and send iMessages and SMS from your agent.
description: iMessage/SMS CLI for listing chats, viewing message history, and sending messages via Messages.app on macOS.
installSteps: Grant Full Disk Access to your terminal app in System Settings > Privacy & Security.

name: Web Search & Fetch
oneLiner: Search the web and extract readable content from any URL.
description: Search the web using Brave Search API and fetch readable content from URLs. Supports region-specific and localized search with customizable result counts.
installSteps: Get a Brave Search API key from https://brave.com/search/api/

Add your API key to the environment:
```bash
export BRAVE_SEARCH_API_KEY=your_key_here
```

envVars.name: BRAVE_SEARCH_API_KEY
envVars.description: Brave Search API key for web searches

name: Discord
oneLiner: Send messages, manage channels, and interact with Discord servers.
description: Discord operations via the message tool. Send messages, manage channels, and interact with Discord servers through your AI agent.
installSteps: Create a Discord bot at https://discord.com/developers

envVars.name: DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN
envVars.description: Discord bot token for API access
